audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in getpass.c are guarded: `prompt` is unconditionally null-checked at L82 before any use; `fi` is assigned `stdin` if `fopen` returns NULL (L91), and the `fi != stdin` guard at L94 restricts `fileno(fi)` calls to the successful-fopen branch only; `getc(fi)` at L109 operates on either a valid fopen handle or `stdin`, which is guaranteed non-NULL by POSIX. No unguarded dereference path exists within this file.
